detaileddescription.para: This function computes a 2D affine transformation matrix based on scale, rotation, translation, and zoom parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to geometric information structure
is a pointer to output transformation matrix

memberdef.argsstring: (float *m1, int h1, int w1, float *m2, int h2, int w2, float *m3)
memberdef.name: matrix_multiply

detaileddescription.para: This function performs matrix multiplication: m3 = m1 * m2.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to first matrix
is the height (rows) of first matrix
is the width (columns) of first matrix
is a pointer to second matrix
is the height (rows) of second matrix
is the width (columns) of second matrix
is a pointer to result matrix

detaileddescription.para: This function applies a 2D affine transformation matrix to an array of keystone points.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the affine transformation matrix
is a pointer to input keystone points
is a pointer to output projected points

detaileddescription.para: This function estimates a 3x3 projective transformation matrix from four point correspondences using Gaussian elimination.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to source points array (8 values)
is a pointer to destination points array (8 values)
is a pointer to output transformation matrix (9 values)

detaileddescription.para: This function performs Gaussian elimination with partial pivoting to solve a system of linear equations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the augmented matrix
is the number of columns in the matrix

detaileddescription.para: This function computes the inverse of a 3x3 matrix using the adjoint method and determinant calculation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to source 3x3 matrix
is a pointer to destination inverse matrix

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the absolute value of a floating-point number.

parameterdescription.para: is the input value

detaileddescription.para: This is a placeholder function for cosine calculation.

parameterdescription.para: is the angle value

detaileddescription.para: This is a placeholder function for sine calculation.

parameterdescription.para: is the angle value

detaileddescription.para: This function computes the complete geometric transformation by combining affine and projective transforms based on keystone parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to geometric information structure

detaileddescription.para: This function converts floating-point geometric parameters to fixed-point representation for hardware configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to floating-point geometric info
is a pointer to driver configuration structure

detaileddescription.para: This function converts user-provided warp configuration parameters into driver-specific configuration format for both warp initialization and warp filter operations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to driver configuration structure
is a pointer to input warp configuration
